title: Požarevac, Braničevo — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Požarevac, Braničevo: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Požarevac is a city in Braničevo with a population of 44,000. A city in eastern Serbia, the birthplace of the Roman Emperor Constantine the Great and known for its thermal spa and the nearby Drmno coal mine.

Last updated: July 20, 2026
